temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot shows a hand covered in dirt and blood, with a single drop of blood falling from the index finger. The hand is positioned over a murky, greenish-brown liquid, possibly water or a cleaning solution, with some leaves floating on the surface. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a sense of violence and mystery, suggesting a recent struggle or accident involving the character.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint, wet splashing sound is heard.)
(00:02-00:06) A woman with brown hair and a concerned expression looks off-screen. Her face is slightly flushed, and her eyes are wide with worry as she speaks. She is wearing a dark-colored top. (Storyline: The woman's dialogue and expression suggest she is describing a disturbing discovery, likely related to the hand seen in the first shot. She is recounting details of something broken and dirty.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Worried, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, indistinct background noise.)
